Tanker Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
March 25, 2025
• Positive Momentum Drives VLCC Spot Rates Higher as Tonnage Tightens - A
Short-term Indicators
wave of positive momentum swept through the VLCC market in the Arabian Gulf,
Momentum: Negative
fueled by a surge in chartering activity for early April loadings. This spike in demand
temporarily tightened available tonnage, allowing owners to push for higher rates. Sentiment: Neutral
The current direction of the freight market has left owners optimistic, while Fundamentals: Positive
charterers have adopted a wait-and-see approach, holding off on fresh inquiries to
avoid contributing further to upward rate pressure.
